name: Down and Dirty Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the ground beef with salt and cayenne pepper.
2. Cook the beef in butter, stirring to crumble, until browned.
3. Add parsley and green onions. Cook until vegetables are softened.
4. Stir in rice and add broth. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour.
6. Sprinkle surface of rice with black pepper before serving.
7. For variety, use 1 cup wild rice with 1 cup regular rice.
